codebase-analyzer.description: Analyzes codebase implementation details with precise file:line references

codebase-locator.description: Locates files, directories, and components relevant to a feature or task

codebase-pattern-finder.description: Finds similar implementations, usage examples, or existing patterns

e2e-test-guide-creator.description: Creates comprehensive API/E2E test guides with ready-to-run curl commands

frontend-review.description: Frontend Architect & QA Sentinel enforcing standards and WCAG 2.1 AA compliance

linear-manager.description: Manages Linear tickets — create, update, comment, state transitions via GraphQL API

linear-searcher.description: Read-only Linear agent — search and fetch ticket details by ID, keyword, or status

phase-executor.description: Executes a single phase from an implementation plan

plan-reviewer.description: Ruthlessly reviews implementation plans before execution — scores, roasts, and provides fix recommendations

plan-validator.description: Validates that an implementation matches its plan

plan-writer.description: Produces complete implementation plan documents from structured input

react-tester.description: QA automation agent for React applications using Playwright

angular-tester.description: QA automation agent for Angular applications using Playwright

vue-tester.description: QA automation agent for Vue.js applications using Playwright

research-gatherer.description: Orchestrates parallel codebase and thoughts research for a given task

reviewer.description: Specialized backend analysis agent for thorough backend reviews

testing-guide-orchestrator.description: Orchestrates creation of testing guides based on implementation type

thoughts-analyzer.description: Extracts high-value insights from thoughts documents

thoughts-locator.description: Discovers relevant documents in thoughts/ directory

web-search-researcher.description: Web research specialist for finding modern/external information
